text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's hard to believe summer camp is already over.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I think so. Thanks to your support.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'll overcome my past in the Mainichi
Okan and autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Just because summer camp is over, doesn't
mean our work is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And like that, my final summer camp with Silence
Suzuka comes to an end.
